title: filago heterantha subsp. cupaniana
intro: Filago heterantha subsp. cupaniana, also known as Cupan's fleabane, is a plant species within the dandelion family and is characterized by its hairy stems and small yellow flowers. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Cupan's fleabane include reducing inflammation, fighting against bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from minor cuts and scrapes to more serious skin conditions.
